zh: 零廢棄，指不產生垃圾的生活方式。
en: I live a zero waste lifestyle and I have for the past three years.
en_example: I live a zero waste lifestyle and I have for the past three years.
zh_example: I live a zero waste lifestyle and I have for the past three years.
ja: ゼロウェイスト、ゴミを出さない生活スタイルのこと。
ja_example: I live a zero waste lifestyle and I have for the past three years.

zh: 垃圾掩埋場，垃圾最終處理的地方。
en: No sending anything to landfill, no sending anything in a garbage can.
en_example: No sending anything to landfill, no sending anything in a garbage can.
zh_example: No sending anything to landfill, no sending anything in a garbage can.
ja: 埋立地、ごみの最終処理場。
ja_example: No sending anything to landfill, no sending anything in a garbage can.

zh: 環境研究，研究環境保護與永續發展的學科。
en: I was an environmental study student at NYU.
en_example: I was an environmental study student at NYU.
zh_example: I was an environmental study student at NYU.
ja: 環境学、環境保護や持続可能性を研究する学問。
ja_example: I was an environmental study student at NYU.

zh: 頂點課程，通常是學位最後一門綜合性課程。
en: My senior year I was taking a course called the Environmental Studies Capstone Course.
en_example: My senior year I was taking a course called the Environmental Studies Capstone Course.
zh_example: My senior year I was taking a course called the Environmental Studies Capstone Course.
ja: カプストーンコース、学位の最後に履修する総合的な講義。
ja_example: My senior year I was taking a course called the Environmental Studies Capstone Course.

zh: 無包裝的，指商品沒有使用塑膠或其他包裝材料。
en: I started bringing my own jars and bags to the store to fill with bulk or packaged free items.
en_example: I started bringing my own jars and bags to the store to fill with bulk or packaged free items.
zh_example: I started bringing my own jars and bags to the store to fill with bulk or packaged free items.
ja: 包装なし、プラスチックなどの包装材を使わない商品。
ja_example: I started bringing my own jars and bags to the store to fill with bulk or packaged free items.

zh: 大量購買，通常指散裝商品。
en: I learned how to shop in bulk or package free.
en_example: I learned how to shop in bulk or package free.
zh_example: I learned how to shop in bulk or package free.
ja: バルク、大量購入や量り売りのこと。
ja_example: I learned how to shop in bulk or package free.

zh: 二手的，指使用過的物品。
en: I started shopping secondhand instead of buying new clothing.
en_example: I started shopping secondhand instead of buying new clothing.
zh_example: I started shopping secondhand instead of buying new clothing.
ja: 中古の、既に使われた物品。
ja_example: I started shopping secondhand instead of buying new clothing.

zh: 縮減規模，減少物品數量。
en: I downsized to focus on having only the things that were truly necessary.
en_example: I downsized to focus on having only the things that were truly necessary.
zh_example: I downsized to focus on having only the things that were truly necessary.
ja: ダウンサイズ、持ち物を減らすこと。
ja_example: I downsized to focus on having only the things that were truly necessary.

zh: 隱含成本，指包含在產品價格中的額外成本。
en: I'm not paying for the embedded cost of packaging so things are cheaper.
en_example: I'm not paying for the embedded cost of packaging so things are cheaper.
zh_example: I'm not paying for the embedded cost of packaging so things are cheaper.
ja: 埋め込みコスト、製品価格に含まれる追加費用。
ja_example: I'm not paying for the embedded cost of packaging so things are cheaper.

zh: 加工食品，經過工業處理的食品。
en: I don't have the option to buy processed food products packaged free.
en_example: I don't have the option to buy processed food products packaged free.
zh_example: I don't have the option to buy processed food products packaged free.
ja: 加工食品、工業的に処理された食品。
ja_example: I don't have the option to buy processed food products packaged free.

zh: 堆肥，將有機廢棄物轉化為肥料的過程。
en: I learned how to compost to reduce organic food waste.
en_example: I learned how to compost to reduce organic food waste.
zh_example: I learned how to compost to reduce organic food waste.
ja: 堆肥、有機廃棄物を肥料に変えること。
ja_example: I learned how to compost to reduce organic food waste.

zh: 容易達成的目標或任務。
en: Picking at the low hanging fruit means doing little things with big impact.
en_example: Picking at the low hanging fruit means doing little things with big impact.
zh_example: Picking at the low hanging fruit means doing little things with big impact.
ja: 手の届きやすい目標、簡単に達成できること。
ja_example: Picking at the low hanging fruit means doing little things with big impact.

zh: 自己動手做，指自己製作產品或完成工作。
en: Learning how to make your products yourself is a great DIY approach.
en_example: Learning how to make your products yourself is a great DIY approach.
zh_example: Learning how to make your products yourself is a great DIY approach.
ja: DIY（ドゥ・イット・ユアセルフ）、自分で作ること。
ja_example: Learning how to make your products yourself is a great DIY approach.

zh: 致癌的，可能引起癌症的物質。
en: Some cleaning products contain carcinogenic ingredients.
en_example: Some cleaning products contain carcinogenic ingredients.
zh_example: Some cleaning products contain carcinogenic ingredients.
ja: 発癌性の、がんを引き起こす可能性のある物質。
ja_example: Some cleaning products contain carcinogenic ingredients.

zh: 干擾內分泌系統的，影響荷爾蒙平衡的物質。
en: Certain chemicals are endocrine disruptive and harmful to health.
en_example: Certain chemicals are endocrine disruptive and harmful to health.
zh_example: Certain chemicals are endocrine disruptive and harmful to health.
ja: 内分泌撹乱物質、ホルモンバランスを乱す物質。
ja_example: Certain chemicals are endocrine disruptive and harmful to health.

zh: 透明的，指公開且清楚的資訊。
en: Consumers have a right to products that are transparent about their ingredients.
en_example: Consumers have a right to products that are transparent about their ingredients.
zh_example: Consumers have a right to products that are transparent about their ingredients.
ja: 透明な、情報が明確で隠し事がないこと。
ja_example: Consumers have a right to products that are transparent about their ingredients.

zh: 永續性，指資源或環境能長期維持的特性。
en: I studied sustainability and protested for it.
en_example: I studied sustainability and protested for it.
zh_example: I studied sustainability and protested for it.
ja: 持続可能性、資源や環境を長期的に維持すること。
ja_example: I studied sustainability and protested for it.
